method: cluster by creative-unit (framework|format|hook) → gates (recurrence≥2 creators, transfer≥2 niches, performance≥corpus-median vpf) → agent-named formula + 3-part name

trends.name: Text-card silent relatability loop
trends.formula: Relatable situation shown → bold text overlay names it → escalating text beats → punchline payoff
trends.whyItTravels: Silent text carries the joke/insight with sound off, so it reads in any niche or feed.

trends.name: Screen-record utility walkthrough
trends.formula: Open inside the app/screen → show the steps live → result on screen → implied 'go get it'
trends.whyItTravels: Watching the tool actually work is proof; transfers to any app or digital workflow.

trends.name: Handheld POV belief-flip confession
trends.formula: State a common belief → POV doubt/confession → quick contradiction → corrected behavior
trends.whyItTravels: A first-person 'I was wrong' disarms skepticism, which travels across burned categories.

trends.name: Handheld POV transformation reveal
trends.formula: Show the before state → POV process handheld → transformation reveal → satisfied payoff
trends.whyItTravels: The visual before/after is its own proof, niche-agnostic and shareable.

trends.name: Caption-card before-after transformation
trends.formula: Text states the before → cut → text states the after → visual proof
trends.whyItTravels: Caption-led transformations need no spoken hook and recur across the widest set of niches.

trends.name: Problem-card grimy-to-gleaming flip
trends.formula: Text names the problem → agitate the gross/annoying state → product enters → clean 'after'
trends.whyItTravels: The disgust-to-relief swing is universal; the text card makes it caption-safe.

trends.name: Text-overlay aesthetic vibe montage
trends.formula: Aesthetic clips + running text commentary → vibe builds → identity payoff
trends.whyItTravels: Vibe + relatable text lets any lifestyle niche ride the same montage shell.

trends.name: Hands-on demo direct-callout
trends.formula: Call out the buyer/problem → hands demonstrate the product → visible result → implicit get
trends.whyItTravels: Showing the product work to a named person is the broadest, most-used winning shell.

trends.name: Lifestyle this-vs-that comparison
trends.formula: Option A shown → option B side-by-side → the winner is obvious
trends.whyItTravels: Head-to-head contrast lets the viewer judge for themselves; works for any pick.

trends.name: Lifestyle no-excuse barrier-drop
trends.formula: Name the barrier/excuse → show it done anyway in real life → result
trends.whyItTravels: Removing the disqualifier ('even if…') recruits people who counted themselves out.

trends.name: Product-demo even-if proof
trends.formula: Name the usual disqualifier → demo it works anyway → concrete proof
trends.whyItTravels: 'Works even if X' converts the skeptics that other angles lose.

trends.name: Voiceover b-roll tip explainer
trends.formula: Narrate the tip over b-roll → walk the steps → payoff
trends.whyItTravels: Voice-led teaching over cheap b-roll is fast to make and reads as helpful, not salesy.

trends.name: Talking-head pain-callout pitch
trends.formula: Call out the sufferer → agitate the pain → solution reveal → CTA
trends.whyItTravels: Direct face-to-camera callout to a specific pain is high-intent and category-portable.

trends.name: Contrarian secret-reveal b-roll
trends.formula: Declassify a secret → name the industry failure → reframe → proof
trends.whyItTravels: 'What they won't tell you' reframing wins skeptical, sophisticated markets.

trends.name: Authority-framed product demo
trends.formula: Authority/credential claim → demo → why it works → trust payoff
trends.whyItTravels: Borrowed expertise de-risks the buy; transfers wherever trust is the blocker.

trends.name: Voiceover problem-to-fix walkthrough
trends.formula: Narrate the problem → agitate → show the fix → relief
trends.whyItTravels: Narrated problem→fix needs no on-camera talent and suits service/home niches.

trends.name: Without-the-effort shortcut demo
trends.formula: Promise the result without the usual cost → minimal demo → lifestyle win
trends.whyItTravels: Effort-averse buyers respond to 'the result without the work' across categories.

trends.name: Handheld in-the-moment POV
trends.formula: Drop into a real moment → handheld follow → casual product appearance
trends.whyItTravels: Feeling 'in the moment' collapses the ad distance; the product rides along naturally.
